content:
The user is asking me to "make text bigger" on the current page. The current page is a CNN article page (https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/world/example-story/index.html). 

To make text bigger, I would typically need to:
1. First read the current page to understand its structure
2. Find text size controls or zoom functionality
3. Increase the text size

Let me start by reading the current page to see what's available.[
